title: OR--ICU--Ward Recourse Guidance Reproducibility Package
description: Code, configurations, derived results, source-provenance records, and schedule-identity audits supporting the manuscript "When Does Downstream Recourse Guidance Improve Surgical Planning? Evidence Across Candidate-Pool Load Regimes".

creators.name: Hu, Jiaming
creators.affiliation: School of Information Engineering, Shandong Management University

creators.name: Miao, Cuixia
creators.affiliation: School of Mathematical Sciences, Qufu Normal University

notes: This release reproduces the final M1--M3 figures, baseline-load validation, fixed-schedule score-weight sensitivity analysis, and scalar-pricing schedule-identity audit. Mannino raw data and derived pools are not redistributed; deterministic preprocessing instructions and SHA-256 verification manifests are included.
